description:
Use the new tags from .5 and .6 to filter the outcomes dump.

## Default behavior

Hide:
- `Prelude` category (vec_get noise everyone sees in every fixture).
- Bodies whose fn isn't in `reachable_specs` (post-reduction dead bodies — e.g., classify/fact bodies in fixtures/multi_clause where main fully folds).

Show:
- Everything else, grouped by caller as today.

## Flags

Add CLI flags to widen:
- `--all` — show prelude + dead bodies too.
- (Optional) `--category=user,k,...` filter, deferred unless trivial.

## Verify

- Re-run ast_eval, multi_clause, fib_tailrec, closure_typed_captures dumps. They should be visibly cleaner: no vec_get, no dead-code body chatter. The signal-to-noise ratio jumps.
- Fixture goldens for `expected.outcomes` shrink — BLESS=1 to re-record.
- Spot-check: nothing user-relevant disappears.

## Blocked by

fz-f88.5, fz-f88.6
title: fz-RS.7 — dump_outcomes_pipeline filters by category + reachability
